benefits.description: Felt not hungry for weeks; described as unpleasant, like losing appetite during the flu

side_effects.description: Waking up 90 minutes earlier than normal, getting up to pee and being wide awake, unable to go back to sleep

protocol_notes: OP states they are very sensitive to anything affecting sleep; previously could not sleep on CJC; can tolerate Tesamorelin but only under 500mcg/day. Stopped Reta and sleep disturbance persisted for at least one week before returning to normal.
